# KinMate v1.2.0 — The Health Intelligence release

## Release Date

2026-06-08

## Summary

KinMate is the private place your family's health lives in: every report,
every dose, every reminder for everyone you love — yourself, your aging
parents, your kids, even your pets. v1.2.0 is the **Health Intelligence**
release: on top of the v1.0 foundation, we added a full layer of AI that
reads your reports, tracks your trends, surfaces genetic risk, and
translates everything between English and Chinese the moment a different
doctor needs to read it.

This note is written for people who will *use* KinMate, not just install
it. It absorbs everything still relevant from v1.0 so you have one
complete picture in one place.

## Who KinMate is for

The default health admin in a real family — the spouse who keeps the
medication list straight, the eldest daughter who books the parents'
checkups, the diaspora son who video-calls when grandma forgets a pill,
the partner who has to find last year's blood work the night before a
hospital appointment.

If you've ever been asked "where's that report?" and felt your stomach
drop, KinMate is built for you.

## What you can do with KinMate today

**Capture in seconds.** Snap a photo, pick from your library, or import
a PDF. KinMate files it by person, date, and report type. OCR pulls
out the text so it's searchable later.

**Read reports together.** AI reads a dense lab report and explains it
in plain English or Chinese — abnormal indicators highlighted, normal
ones quietly listed, with a clear "this is not a diagnosis" tone.

**Track and trend.** Blood pressure, glucose, lipids, liver and kidney
values — charted over 7, 30, 90, or 365 days, with normal-range
markers. Trends are computed locally; AI summarizes when you ask.

**Reach the people you care for.** Manage profiles for elderly
parents, children, and pets. Invite real family members into a shared
family group; share specific profiles only when it helps.

**Remember everything.** Track prescriptions and get gentle local
reminders for doses, follow-ups, vaccines, and vet visits. Never spam,
never push-notification-as-marketing.

**Keep it private.** Your reports, photos, and AI summaries live in
your device's secure storage. We never see your files. Back up to your
own iCloud Drive, Google Drive, or OneDrive with a key only you hold.

**When something happens.** Generate a private emergency medical card
— allergies, conditions, medications, emergency contacts — accessible
by QR code, offline, so a paramedic can read it in five seconds.

## New in v1.2 — Health Intelligence

### AI report interpretation

Point KinMate at a lab report (image, PDF, or already-OCR'd text) and
it returns a structured interpretation: a short summary, abnormal
indicators with friendly explanations, normal indicators tucked under
a fold, detected medications you can turn into reminders, and
next-step suggestions. Never a diagnosis, always a disclaimer.

### Bilingual interpretation, one tap

The same interpretation can be flipped between English and Chinese
with one tap on the report page. Original stays preserved. The
translated version is cached so subsequent taps are instant and cost
no extra AI quota. The moment you hand the phone to a doctor who reads
the other language, you switch — and every number, unit, ICD code,
and lab range stays verbatim.

### Health trends with AI summary

The trends page now layers an AI risk-level read on top of the chart:
which metrics deserve attention, what the change pattern means,
generic lifestyle suggestions — refreshed only when your data
actually changes, so the same trend never burns AI quota twice.

### Genetic risk analysis

Tell KinMate about your family's medical history. It surfaces hereditary
conditions worth monitoring with risk levels and preventive
suggestions — useful for the conversation you'll eventually want to
have with a physician. Cached locally; only recomputes on a manual
refresh.

### Medical case management

Diagnoses, severity, ICD-10 codes, related reports and medications, a
case timeline. Cases can be marked active or resolved; resolved cases
quietly stay searchable.

### Emergency medical card

A QR code that opens a no-app-needed web page with the carrier's
allergies, conditions, current medications, and emergency contacts.
Works offline once issued. Refresh it any time you change a profile.

### Health timeline

A single chronological feed across reports, metric records, case
events, medication changes, vaccines, and pet care logs. Filter by
profile or by event type when you need to focus.

### Family health dashboard

For family plans: one overview of everyone you care for, with
attention-needing items surfaced at the top — overdue reminders,
missed check-ins, abnormal metrics that haven't been read.

### Patient summary, ready for any doctor

Generate a structured summary (basics, history, current medications,
recent labs, allergies) that you can share when visiting a new doctor.
The same one-tap English/Chinese translation applies — so the summary
arrives in the language the doctor reads.

## Privacy and how we keep ourselves honest

- **Local-first by default.** Reports, photos, OCR text, AI summaries
  — they live in your device's secure storage. We never have a copy
  unless you choose to back up.
- **Bring your own cloud.** Optional encrypted backup to your own
  iCloud Drive, Google Drive, or OneDrive. The encryption key is on
  your device; we cannot read your backup either.
- **End-to-end encrypted.** When KinMate has to sync something
  cross-device (a shared family member, an AI interpretation cache),
  it goes through a key only your devices hold.
- **Zero analytics SDKs.** No third-party crash reporters or analytics
  watching what you do inside the app.
- **GDPR-aligned.** Export your data, delete your account, see what
  we hold — built in, not on request.

## Plans and pricing

Seven tiers, designed around a flexible-seat-pool model so you never
pay for empty seats.

| Plan | What you get |
| --- | --- |
| **Free** | Yourself + 1 pet, 3 reports kept locally, 3 AI interpretations per month |
| **Personal Plus** | 2 dependents, 2 pets, 30 AI interpretations per month |
| **Family 3 / 5 / 8** | 3 / 5 / 8 real family seats + a flexible pool you can use for extra dependents, with 60 / 100 / 160 AI interpretations per month |
| **Family 10 / 12** | Larger households — talk to support |

### Family 8 launch special — lifetime

For the launch window only: Family 8 is sold as a **one-time
purchase of $199.99**, regular price $399.99 (50 % off). One purchase,
yours forever, with all future core feature updates included.

Already-purchased lifetime accounts are honored even after the
launch promo ends; at that point Family 8 returns to the regular
monthly / annual subscription pricing.

A 60-day free Pro trial is included for every new account.

## How to install

App Store and Google Play submissions are currently **under review**.
Until they go live, install the signed Android APK directly from our
GitHub releases — the in-app experience is identical.

- iOS — App Store · *under review*
- Android — Google Play · *under review*
- Android — direct signed APK · available

When either store publishes, this section updates and the badges on
the download page flip to "Install" automatically.

## Compatibility

- iOS 15 or newer
- Android 10 or newer
- English and 简体中文 throughout — interface, AI, content

## What was already there in v1.0

v1.0 set the foundation that v1.2 built on: the 60-day launch trial,
the flexible-pool subscription model, the Family 3 / Family 8 hot
tiers, and the in-app pricing experience aligned with the public
landing site. If you arrived during the v1.0 launch period your
subscription, trial, and seat pool carry forward unchanged.

## Notes for operators

- The downloadable Android APK is generated only on an explicit
  `vX.Y.Z` tag push to the kinmate app repository — no nightly
  builds. The landing site's download badge pulls its version from
  `data/release.json`, which the release pipeline writes on each
  tag.
- App Store and Google Play badges render as "Under review · Coming
  soon" until the store URLs are filled in via
  `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_STORE_URL` / `NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_PLAY_URL`. When
  filled, drop the `comingSoon` props on `<StoreBadge>` and delete
  the `download.underReviewBanner` / `pendingBadge` / `comingSoon`
  i18n keys.
- All Edge Functions and SQL changes for v1.2 are deployed to the
  `dev` Supabase project; production deploy + Apple receipt webhook
  + Google Play webhook flip is gated on the App Store / Play Store
  approvals.

## What's coming after v1.2

- Live store availability once Apple and Google reviews complete.
- An English landing-page push covering the same Health Intelligence
  story with localized AI screenshots.
- The full FIX-701 ~ 703 batch (unified AI quota, custody split,
  cross-language interpretation toggle) is already in v1.2.0 — the
  technical changelog lives under `docs/kinmate/v1.2/`.
